sanity_signals: mark-count=pass reconciled=true (616=616, Worksheet>Copy>Data on source and applied sheets)
render_evidence.run: oracle-leg replay (W44-STAMP-PORT config): independent authored oracle on bundled Sample - Superstore; bind gate honestly escalated not-fast-path pre-stamp (recorded); apply via identity placeholder fill (no rewrites -- native Superstore geo names); all 12 config facets green on the applied readback
render_evidence.basis: golden-parity gate run 2026-07-11 (oracle-leg): structural 0.97297 (5/5 critical, 3/3 high; sole miss = salience-1 resolved-title cosmetic -- applied sheet name differs from oracle sheet name by design), pixel 1.0 (6 counted ROIs, same-geometry back-to-back captures), composite 98, binding-sanity sane via reconciled Copy>Data mark counts 616=616. Geocoding proven live: generated Lat/Long materialized on the bundled xls (manifest hazards generated-geo-required + geo-bind-not-geocodable closed for this datasource); bundled-xls geo grain measured 616 (CookBook Superstore's was 605 -- different data vintage, both internally reconciled).
render_evidence.lane: fable-direct stamp batch 2026-07-11 (orchestrator live gate run; oracle-stamp.mjs CONFIG=spatial-symbol-map PID=65652)
render_evidence.pixel_oracle: source render (same-geometry back-to-back captures on the live instance; 6 counted ROIs). Source and applied are two INDEPENDENT renders of the same data.

description: A point (symbol) map: one Circle mark per geographic member, placed on generated Lat/Long, sized by a measure. Distinct from a choropleth (which fills regions); use when magnitude is encoded by symbol size rather than region shading.

slots.notes: template column carries semantic-role='[Country].[ISO3166_2]'; the LOD level drives generated Lat/Long. Portability is 'across the committed fixture classes + render-verified', not a blanket 'any dataset'.
template column carries semantic-role='[City].[Name]'; finest geographic grain — one symbol per city.
aggregated measure driving symbol size (proportional-symbol encoding).

hazards.detail: Rows/Cols are [Latitude (generated)]/[Longitude (generated)] — Tableau auto-generates these ONLY when the bound LOD fields carry a recognized geographic semantic-role. Binding non-geo dimensions produces no map (empty generated coordinates).
A geo-slot bind proves role==dimension, NOT that the bound field geocodes; the sanity/render leg is the backstop (same residual as spatial-choropleth-map).
